input.content: In a texas holdem game, Who won in the poker game with players Alex, Sam, Robert and Steve given the cards Alex':['A of spades', 'K of spades'], 'Sam': ['2 of diamonds', '3 of clubs'], 'Robert': ['Q of hearts', '10 of hearts'], 'Steve': ['4 of spades', '5 of spades']?

tools.name: poker_game_winner
tools.description: Identify the winner in a poker game based on the cards. Note that the provided function is in Python 3 syntax.

players.description: Names of the players in a list.

cards.description: An object containing the player name as key and the cards as values in a list.

type.description: Type of poker game. Defaults to 'Texas Holdem'
